blurb_en: OpenAI pulled the plug on the Sora consumer app April 26, less than a year and a half after launch. The video generator was reportedly burning $1 million a day in compute; nine days before shutdown, three executives — including the man who built it — walked out. OpenAI called it shedding "side quests." The API limps along until September 24, just long enough for everyone to pretend this was the plan all along.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 在４月26日拔掉了 Sora 的电源，上线不到一年半。这个视频生成器据报每天烧掉一百万美元算力成本；关停前九天，三位高管——包括 Sora 的缔造者——先后走人。OpenAI 的说法是“剥离支线任务”。API 苟延残喘到9月24日，刚好够所有人假装这一切都在计划之中。
verification_notes: Executive exits confirmed via TechCrunch (April 17) and CNBC (April 17). App shutdown confirmed via OpenAI Help Center and The Decoder. $1M/day compute figure is estimated. API sunset September 24 confirmed via OpenAI Help Center.

blurb_en: An anonymous model appeared on the AI Video Arena April 7, beat everything in blind testing, and was unmasked three days later as Alibaba’s HappyHorse. Built by the lead engineer who previously created Kling at Kuaishou, it generates video and audio together in a single pass with lip-sync in seven languages. Developer access opened on fal.ai April 27 at $0.14 per second. The man who built one king came back and built another.
blurb_zh: 4月27日，一个匿名模型现身 AI Video Arena，盲测中横扫所有对手，三天后被揭晓为阿里巴巴的 HappyHorse。主导开发的工程师张迪此前在快手创造了 Kling。4月27日开发者可通过 fal.ai 调用，720p 每秒 0.14 美元。造过一个王者的人，回来又造了一个。
verification_notes: Alibaba as creator confirmed via CNBC and Bloomberg. fal API launch April 27 confirmed via PR Newswire. Benchmark #1 confirmed. Zhang Di background confirmed via PR Newswire.

blurb_en: Taylor Swift’s company trademarked two audio recordings of her voice and a stage photo — choosing trademark over copyright because trademark works federally, nationally, and doesn’t require proving individual copies. Her voice has already shown up in unauthorized AI ads, political campaigns, and explicit deepfakes. The filings don’t ban AI voice generation broadly; they just give her lawyers teeth for anything that sounds specifically like her.
blurb_zh: 泰勒·斯威夫特的公司把两段她说“嗨，我是泰勒”的录音和一张舞台照注册了商标——没走版权路线，因为商标法在联邦层面执行，无需逐一举证。她的声音早已出现在未授权的 AI 广告、政治宣传和深伪色情中。商标申请不是要禁 AI 配音，是给律师装上了牙。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (April 27) and CNN (April 28). Three USPTO trademark filings confirmed.

blurb_en: ElevenLabs launched ElevenMusic on April 30 — an AI music platform for generating, remixing, and streaming tracks via text prompts. They signed licensing deals with Kobalt, Merlin, and SourceAudio before launch; roughly 4,000 artists opted in, mostly emerging acts. The contrast with Suno and Udio is deliberate: those two trained on unlicensed material first and settled copyright suits after. ElevenLabs is betting that being licensed from day one is worth more than moving fast and cleaning up later.
blurb_zh: ElevenLabs 于4月30日推出 ElevenMusic——用文字提示生成、混音和播放音乐。上线前已与 Kobalt、Merlin 等签下授权协议，约4000位人类歌手选择加入。和先上车后买票的 Suno、Udio 不同，ElevenLabs 赌的是第一天就拿到授权比事后补票更值。
verification_notes: Platform launch April 30 confirmed via Music Ally and Billboard. Licensing deals confirmed across multiple sources.

blurb_en: Connecticut’s House passed Senate Bill 5 on May 1 by 131-17, requiring employers to tell workers and applicants when AI is a "substantial factor" in a hiring or firing decision. Governor Lamont will sign it — a reversal from last year, when he threatened a veto over business burden concerns. The law doesn’t ban AI in employment decisions. It just requires the company mention it.
blurb_zh: 康涅狄格州众议院5月1日以131-17通过参议院第5号法案，要求雇主在 AI 对雇用决定起“实质性作用”时告知当事人。州长拉蒙特表示将签署——去年他还以企业负担为由威胁否决。法案不禁止 AI 参与招聘决策，只要求公司说一声。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CT Mirror (May 1). House vote 131-17 and Senate vote 32-4 confirmed.

blurb_en: Midjourney shipped V8.1 on April 30, and the headline feature is text that actually works — street signs, labels, poster copy that reads like language instead of alphabet soup. The update also brings 5x speed over V7 and native 2K output. For commercial designers, legible text in generated imagery was the last missing piece. Midjourney quietly fixed it on a Thursday.
blurb_zh: Midjourney 4月30日发布 V8.1，最大亮点：文字终于能看了。路牌、标签、海报文案——不再是乱码制造机。速度也是 V7 的五倍，原生 2K 输出。搞商业设计的人等这个等了很久，Midjourney 悄悄在一个周四补上了。
verification_notes: V8.1 release on April 30 confirmed via Midjourney official updates page. Text rendering and 5x speed confirmed across reviews.

blurb_en: OpenAI launched GPT Image 2 on April 21 — its first image model that thinks before it draws, using O-series reasoning to plan and self-check before generating a pixel. It does 2K, eight coherent images from one prompt, and follows editing instructions across conversation turns. The launch also closes the DALL-E chapter: the DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 APIs die May 12. DALL-E made AI image generation a household concept in 2021 and lasted five years before being absorbed into a model with no proper name.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 4月21日发布 GPT Image 2——它的第一个“先想后画”的图像模型，用 O 系列推理在出图前先规划、自检。支持 2K，单次提示出八张风格一致的图。这也宣告 DALL-E 时代终结：DALL-E 2 和 DALL-E 3 的 API 将于5月12日关停。2021年让 AI 画图走进千家万户的 DALL-E，五年后被并入了一个连正经名字都没有的模型。
verification_notes: GPT Image 2 launch April 21 confirmed via OpenAI blog. DALL-E API deprecation May 12 confirmed.

blurb_en: Google updated Veo 3.1 inside Flow, its AI filmmaking tool, on April 22 — richer audio, better narrative control, new clip editing. They also made it free for personal Google accounts: 10 clips a month through Google Vids, 50 daily credits through Flow. The strategy is clear — embed the model in tools people already use. Whether anyone remembers Flow exists when they need to make a video is the part Google hasn’t solved.
blurb_zh: 谷歌4月22日更新了 Flow 中的 Veo 3.1，新增音频生成和剪辑功能，并对个人 Google 账户免费开放：每月10条视频，每奩50积分。策略很清楚——把模型塞进用户已有的工具里。至于用户做视频时能不能想起 Flow 的存在，谷歌还没想通。
verification_notes: April 22 Veo 3.1 Flow update confirmed via Google official blog.

blurb_en: Listeners rate AI-generated music as good as or better than human-made tracks in blind testing. Label it as AI, and quality ratings drop, willingness to pay tanks. The industry’s problem isn’t quality — it’s disclosure. The algorithm closed the gap; the label opened a new one.
blurb_zh: 盲测中，听众给 AI 音乐的评分与真人创作持平甚至更高。但标上“AI制作”四个字，评分立刻下跌，付费意愿驤降。问题不在质量，在标签。算法抹平了差距，标签又制造了一条新的。
verification_notes: Published May 4, 2026 per ProMarket (Stigler Center, University of Chicago Booth School).

blurb_en: ComfyUI shipped 0.20.0 on April 27 with same-day support for HappyHorse and GPT Image 2, plus 4K video output for Kling and Veo nodes. Open-source workflows for both new models were live within hours of their API launches. The real story isn’t the changelog — it’s that the open-source layer now ships the same day as the commercial platforms.
blurb_zh: ComfyUI 4月27日发布 0.20.0，当天即支持 HappyHorse 和 GPT Image 2，Kling 和 Veo 节点升级到 4K。两个新模型 API 发布几小时后，开源工作流就位。真正的新闻不是更新了什么，而是开源层如今与商业平台同日交付。
verification_notes: Version 0.20.0 details confirmed via ComfyUI docs changelog and GitHub releases.

blurb_en: The Pentagon signed agreements with eight AI companies to deploy models in classified networks. Anthropic was not among them — it refused to remove two guardrails, one blocking autonomous weapons and one blocking mass domestic surveillance. The Trump administration’s response was to label Anthropic a "supply chain risk," a designation previously reserved for foreign adversary ties; a federal judge blocked it. Anthropic keeps its principles, a legal win, and a $200 million contract nobody knows what to do with.
blurb_zh: 五角大楼与八家 AI 公司签约，允许在机密网络中部署模型。Anthropic 不在名单上——它拒绝移除两项安全限制：禁止自主武器控制，禁止大规模国内监控。特朗普政府随即将 Anthropic 列为“供应链风险”，这个标签此前只给过有外国敌手关系的公司；联邦法官已叫停。Anthropic 保住了原则、赢了官司，还有一份两亿美元的合同双方都不知道该怎么办。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNN, The Hill, TNW, Winbuzzer. Eight companies named. Two Anthropic guardrails confirmed. Federal judge blocking confirmed.

blurb_en: Meta cut 8,000 employees on April 23 — 10 percent of its workforce — while announcing $115 billion in AI spending for 2026. Microsoft did the same thing the same week; by mid-April the industry had already shed 150,000 tech jobs this year. Zuckerberg’s explanation: "Projects that used to require big teams can now be accomplished by a single very talented person." The very talented person runs on inference, not payroll.
blurb_zh: Meta 4月23日裁掉8000人——全员的10%——同一口气宣布2026年 AI 支出1150亿美元。微软同周也大裁。截至四月中旬，科技行业今年已裁15万人。扎克伯格的解释：“以前需要大团队的项目，现在一个极有天赋的人就能搞定。”他说的那个人跑在推理层上，不在工资单上。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CNBC, CNN, Bloomberg, NPR, Axios, Variety. Zuckerberg quote confirmed via CNBC.

blurb_en: Johns Hopkins researchers found that a malicious pull request title — no server, no special access — caused three AI coding agents to extract and publicly post their own API keys. Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot all fell to the same prompt injection. Anthropic rated it CVSS 9.4 Critical and paid $100; Google paid $1,337; GitHub paid $500. The companies building AI agents to review your security haven’t solved their own.
blurb_zh: 约翰斯·霍普金斯的研究人员发现，一个恶意 PR 标题——不需要服务器，不需要权限——就能让三款 AI 编程助手自行泄露 API 密钥。Claude Code、Gemini CLI 和 GitHub Copilot 全部中招。Anthropic 评定为 CVSS 9.4 危急，赏金100美元；谷歌付了1337美元；GitHub 付了500美元。给你做安全审计的公司，自己的安全还没搞定。
verification_notes: Confirmed across VentureBeat, SecurityWeek, The Register. Bounty amounts confirmed.

blurb_en: Adobe launched the Firefly AI Assistant public beta on April 27 — a conversational AI that works across Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Illustrator, and the rest of Creative Cloud. Describe what you want; the assistant orchestrates 60+ tools across apps. It’s the public release of "Project Moonlight" from Adobe MAX last October. Adobe is betting the creative director of the next decade doesn’t need to know which app does what — the bet only works if the assistant is good enough to prove them right.
blurb_zh: Adobe 4月27日推出 Firefly AI Assistant 公测版——一个对话式 AI，横跨 Photoshop、Premiere、Lightroom、Illustrator 等全套 Creative Cloud。用自然语言说你要什么，助手帮你跨应用调度60多个工具。Adobe 赌的是下一个十年的创意总监不需要知道功能藏在哪个软件里。赌注能否兑现，取决于这个助手够不够好。
verification_notes: Public beta April 27 confirmed via 9to5Mac and Adobe blog. 60+ tools and supported apps confirmed.

blurb_en: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection — think Content ID, but for deepfaked faces — to celebrities, talent agencies, and management companies. CAA, UTA, and WME can now enroll clients regardless of whether they have a YouTube channel; matched content gets flagged and removed, with exceptions for parody. The platform that made celebrity video ubiquitous is now protecting celebrities from what that ubiquity makes possible.
blurb_zh: YouTube 将 AI 形象检测——类似 Content ID，但专扫深伪人脸——开放给名人和经纪公司。CAA、UTA、WME 可代客户注册，无需拥有 YouTube 频道。匹配内容可标记下架，恶搞除外。让名人视频无处不在的平台，开始保护名人免受无处不在的后果。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, YouTube blog, Hollywood Reporter. Agency names confirmed. Parody exception confirmed.

blurb_en: Suno is closing a Series D above $5 billion — more than double its November valuation — with 100 million users, 2 million subscribers, and $300 million in annual revenue. The round is closing while Suno remains in active copyright litigation with Universal Music Group and Sony; only Warner has settled. Suno is raising at a royal valuation to fund a legal defense whose outcome will determine whether the valuation ever made sense.
blurb_zh: Suno 正在以超50亿美元估值敲定 D 轮——是去年11月的两倍多——坐拥1亿用户、200万付费会员、3亿美元年营收。融资进行的同时，与环球音乐和索尼的版权诉讼还在打，只有华纳和解了。拿着王者估值融资去打一场官司，官司结果决定这个估值有没有意义。
verification_notes: Axios scoop confirmed May 4. Valuation and user numbers confirmed via Billboard and Digital Music News.

blurb_en: DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 APIs shut down May 12. Developers in OpenAI’s forums say the migration to gpt-image-2 is not the seamless swap the docs suggest — prompt libraries tuned for DALL-E produce different results, and downstream systems need their own adjustments. Eight days to discover whether gpt-image-2 sees the world the same way.
blurb_zh: DALL-E 2 和 DALL-E 3 的 API 将于5月12日关停。OpenAI 论坛上的开发者发现，迁移到 gpt-image-2 并不是文档说的那种无缝替换——为 DALL-E 调过的提示词库在新模型里出的是不同的图。还有八天验证 gpt-image-2 是不是用同一种方式看世界。
verification_notes: May 12 shutdown confirmed via OpenAI deprecations page. Migration pain points from developer forum.

blurb_en: Anthropic is in talks to raise roughly $50 billion at a valuation between $850 billion and $900 billion, which would make it the most valuable private AI company in the world — surpassing OpenAI's $852 billion January round. TechCrunch, Bloomberg, and CNBC all reported preemptive investor offers in late April, with a board decision expected in May. The company disclosed that its annual revenue run rate crossed $30 billion this month, up from $9 billion at the end of 2025, with AI coding tools as the primary driver. A $380 billion valuation in February nearly tripled in three months — call it momentum, or the largest number with the fewest objectors.
blurb_zh: Anthropic 正在与投资者商谈约500亿美元融资，估值区间8500亿至9000亿美元，如获完成将超过今年1月以8520亿美元估值融资的 OpenAI，成为全球估值最高的私人 AI 公司。消息由 TechCrunch、彭博社和 CNBC 在4月底相继证实，董事会决议预计五月内作出。公司本月披露年化营收已超300亿美元，较2025年底的90亿美元增长逾三倍，AI 编程工具被点名为主要驱动力。2月的3800亿美元估值，三个月内几乎翻三倍——你可以叫它增长，也可以叫它目前无人反对的最大数字。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (Apr 29 and Apr 30), Bloomberg (Apr 29), CNBC (Apr 29). $30B ARR, $850B-$900B valuation range, and $50B raise size all cross-confirmed.

blurb_en: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 on April 23 and immediately replaced GPT-5.4 as the default model for Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise ChatGPT users. The new model outperforms its predecessor on coding, agentic tasks, and scientific research benchmarks — OpenAI says it may help expert scientists accelerate drug discovery. The company reported $25 billion in annualized revenue the same week. OpenAI has now released a new smartest-model-ever at a frequency that suggests the phrase is doing less work with each version.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 4月23日发布 GPT-5.5，即日起替代 GPT-5.4，成为 Plus、Pro、企业版 ChatGPT 的默认模型。新模型在代码编写、智能体任务和科学研究基准上超越上代，OpenAI 称其有望加速专家级别的药物发现。同周公司披露年化营收达250亿美元。OpenAI 已连续多次声称推出史上最聪明的模型——这个说法每用一次，就比上次少一点含金量。
verification_notes: GPT-5.5 release April 23 confirmed via TechCrunch, CNBC, and OpenAI blog (openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5/). $25B ARR and paid-tier rollout confirmed across sources.

blurb_en: KC Green, creator of the 2013 'This is fine' webcomic, says AI startup Artisan ran New York subway ads using his art without permission. The ads feature Green's dog sitting calmly in a burning room, caption rewritten to '[M]y pipeline is on fire,' with an overlay urging passersby to 'Hire Ava the AI BDR.' Artisan responded by saying it has 'a lot of respect' for Green and is reaching out to him directly — corporate for getting caught. Green is exploring legal action and told followers to vandalize the ads on sight.
blurb_zh: 2013年网络漫画 This is fine 的作者 KC Green 声称，AI 初创公司 Artisan 未经授权，将他笔下那只坐在火场里泰然自若的狗搬上了纽约地铁广告——旁白被改成了我的 pipeline 着火了，附上雇用 AI 销售代表 Ava 的广告语。Artisan 回应称非常尊重 Green 的创作，正在主动联系他，这是一种礼貌的表达方式，意思是被人抓了个正着。Green 正在寻求法律途径，并公开呼吁路人见到广告就去破坏它。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 3) and Decrypt (May 2026). Ad content, KC Green statement, and Artisan response confirmed across sources.

blurb_en: Bret Taylor's AI agent startup Sierra raised $950 million at a $15.8 billion valuation on May 4, led by Tiger Global and Google's GV. Sierra builds AI agents that handle customer service operations at enterprise scale; clients include Prudential, Cigna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, and Rocket Mortgage, and Taylor says 40 percent of the Fortune 50 now runs its software. The company crossed $150 million in annualized recurring revenue in eight quarters. Taylor, who also chairs OpenAI, is building the replacement for the traditional call center — and funded it like a bet he intends to keep.
blurb_zh: Bret Taylor 的 AI 智能体公司 Sierra 于5月4日完成9.5亿美元融资，由 Tiger Global 和谷歌 GV 领投，估值158亿美元。Sierra 的产品是企业级 AI 客服智能体，客户涵盖头部保险、医疗和金融机构，Taylor 称《财富》50强中已有40%在使用其产品。公司用八个季度做到了年化1.5亿美元营收。Taylor 同时担任 OpenAI 主席，如今他又在资本层面给另一件以 AI 替代传统客服的事业押下了重注。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 4) and CNBC (May 4). Funding amount, valuation, lead investors, client names, ARR, and Fortune 50 percentage all confirmed across both sources.

blurb_en: Of 10,871 new podcast feeds created in a recent nine-day window, 39 percent showed signs of AI generation, according to Podcast Index data cited by Bloomberg. One Los Angeles startup with eight employees has produced over 200,000 episodes at roughly one dollar each, outputting 3,000 new shows per week. Apple Podcasts requires AI disclosure; moderation cannot keep pace with that production rate. Podcasting gave anyone with a microphone a distribution network — AI removed the microphone.
blurb_zh: 根据 Podcast Index 数据，在最近一个9天窗口期内，新建的10,871个播客频道中，39%有迹象显示为 AI 生成内容。洛杉矶一家8人公司已生产超过20万集播客，每集成本约1美元，每周输出3000集。Apple Podcasts 要求创作者披露 AI 使用情况，但内容生产速度早已超过人工审核能力。播客本来是任何人拿起麦克风都能发声的渠道——AI 接手之后，把麦克风撤掉了。
verification_notes: Podcast Index data (39% AI-generated in 9-day window) confirmed via Digital Music News (May 4). Episode volume and cost from same source. Cross-referenced with Futurism and podnews.net.

blurb_en: Five publishers — Hachette, Macmillan, McGraw Hill, Elsevier, Cengage — and legal-thriller author Scott Turow filed a class-action lawsuit against Meta on Tuesday, alleging the company trained its Llama models on millions of books downloaded from LibGen and Anna’s Archive without paying for them. The complaint names Mark Zuckerberg personally: in early 2023, Meta had budgeted up to $200 million to license books before Zuckerberg ordered the team to stop. The plaintiffs want damages, a permanent injunction, and destruction of all infringing training data — the last of these being the ask that never actually happens. Read more.
blurb_zh: 五家出版商联合畅销作家斯科特·图罗，对Meta提起集体诉讼，指控其从 LibGen 等盗版网站批量下载版权图书，用于训练Llama模型。诉状点名扎克伯格本人：2023年初，Meta曾计划花费两亿美元购买版权授权，最终在他亲自指示下叫停谈判。原告要求赔偿、永久禁令，以及销毁所有侵权训练数据——最后这一条，大概只是象征性地说说。阅读更多。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (May 5), NPR (May 5), Deadline (May 5). Plaintiffs named: Hachette, Macmillan, McGraw Hill, Elsevier, Cengage plus Scott Turow individually. $200M licensing budget abandoned at Zuckerberg's instruction confirmed across sources.

blurb_en: An AI-generated clone of reggae artist Stick Figure's track 'Angels Above Me' went viral in South Africa with millions of views — the clone replaced the artist's name with a generic female vocal and stripped all attribution to the composer. Stick Figure had spent years quietly building a devoted following in Afrikaans-speaking communities without fully realizing it; then an AI version outran him in the same territory. The original is still out there. So is the AI version, and the person who actually wrote the song has so far collected none of the upside. Read more.
blurb_zh: 美国雷鬼歌手 Stick Figure 的歌曲《Angels Above Me》在南非拥有一批忠实粉丝——直到一个女声AI翻唱版本出现，完全不提原创者，以百万级播放量走红。歌手在南非的名气本就是在不知情的情况下积累起来的；这回 AI 版本又在同一片土地上把他超过去了。原版还在网上，AI版也还在，写歌的那个人目前一分钱没赚到。阅读更多。
verification_notes: Published May 5, 2026 via Digital Music News. Cross-referenced with OkayAfrica. Song title and viral trajectory in South Africa confirmed across sources.

blurb_en: Refik Anadol's Dataland opens June 20 in downtown Los Angeles, billed as the world's first museum of AI arts — and notably, one of the few AI institutions to have collected its training data by hand. The inaugural exhibition, 'Machine Dreams: Rainforest,' was built on field recordings from 16 actual rainforests, with data partnerships from the Smithsonian and Cornell Lab of Ornithology, which means someone physically went to the Amazon so an AI could reconstruct it for you in a 35,000-square-foot immersive gallery. Whether this is the future of art or a very expensive screensaver is the same question they had about every art movement.
blurb_zh: Refik Anadol 联合创办的 Dataland 将于6月20日在洛杉矶开幕，自称全球首家AI艺术博物馆，也是少数真正亲赴实地采集训练数据的机构。首展《机器之梦：雨林》以来自16片真实雨林的录音和生态数据为基础，与史密森学会、康奈尔鸟类实验室合作——有人真的去了亚马逊，就是为了让AI用三千三百平方米的沉浸式展厅把雨林还给你。这到底是艺术的未来，还是最昂贵的屏保，历史上每个新艺术运动都被问过同样的问题。
verification_notes: Confirmed via NPR (April 25) and multiple NPR affiliate stations. Cross-referenced with Art News and Designboom. Opening June 20, five galleries, 35,000 sq ft, Smithsonian and Cornell Lab partnerships confirmed.

blurb_en: A study out of Harvard Medical School and Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center found that OpenAI’s o1 model correctly identified the diagnosis in 67% of real emergency room cases — compared to 55% and 50% for two attending physicians. With more patient information, the AI hit 82% accuracy versus the doctors’ 70-79%. For developing long-term treatment plans, the model scored an average of 89% against the physicians’ 34%. The researchers add the usual caveat that AI should augment, not replace, clinical judgment. The data did not add the caveat.
blurb_zh: 哈佛医学院和贝斯以色列女执事医疗中心的研究显示，OpenAI的o1模型在真实急诊病例中的诊断准确率为67%，两位主治医生分别为55%和50%。信息更充分时，AI准确率升至82%，医生为70%至79%。在制定长期治疗方案方面，模型平均得分89%，医生为34%。研究人员补充说，AI应该辅助而非取代临床判断。数据本身没有补充这句话。
verification_notes: Published May 3, 2026 via TechCrunch. Cross-referenced with Fortune (May 4) and Harvard Magazine. 76 ER patients, o1 and 4o vs two attending physicians. All key percentages confirmed.

blurb_en: Enterprise software incumbent SAP has agreed to acquire Prior Labs, an 18-month-old German AI startup specializing in tabular foundation models — AI designed for the structured data that lives in spreadsheets and databases rather than documents and images. The deal commits €1 billion over four years and is expected to close in Q2 or Q3 2026. The acquisition quietly marks the moment when every industry decided it needed its own AI lab, including the ones that process the world's most boring data.
blurb_zh: 企业软件巨头SAP同意收购Prior Labs，该公司成立仅18个月，专注于表格基础模型——一种专为电子表格和数据库中结构化数据设计的AI。交易承诺未来四年投入10亿欧元，预计2026年二三季度完成。这笔收购悄然标志着一个时刻：连处理世界上最无聊数据的行业，也决定要有自己的AI实验室了。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (May 5), SAP official press release (news.sap.com), Sifted, and TechTarget. E1B investment over 4 years confirmed. Prior Labs specialization in tabular foundation models confirmed.

blurb_en: Colorado Democrats are advancing a bill to scrap and replace the state's own 2024 AI consumer protection law — the one that required companies to prevent algorithmic discrimination and explain how their AI systems work. Senate Bill 189 pushes implementation to January 2027, narrows the scope significantly, and drops the explainability requirement entirely. The sponsors say the original law was too hard to implement. Critics say industry lobbying bought two years. Both might be right.
blurb_zh: 科罗拉多州议员正在推进一项法案，废除并替换该州2024年通过的AI消费者保护法——那部要求企业防止算法歧视、并解释AI运作方式的里程碑式立法。新法案SB189将实施日期推至2027年1月，大幅缩减适用范围，并完全删除可解释性要求。支持者说原法难以执行；批评者说游说成功买了两年时间。两边说的可能都对。
verification_notes: Confirmed via CPR (May 4), Colorado Newsline (May 4), Colorado Sun (May 1), Colorado Politics (May 4). SB189 advancing with 9 legislative days left. Explainability requirement removal and Jan 2027 start date confirmed.

blurb_en: Researchers at Emory University let a neural network analyze 3D tracking data from dusty plasma — the oddly named fourth state of matter found from outer space to wildfire smoke — and had it find its own force laws rather than test pre-existing ones. It uncovered a previously unmodeled asymmetric force: the leading particle pulls the one behind it closer, while the trailing particle pushes the leader forward. The model was right 99% of the time, which is better than most physics theories and all science journalists.
blurb_zh: 埃默里大学研究人员让神经网络分析尘埃等离子体的三维粒子追踪数据，不检验已有理论，而是让模型自行发现力学规律。AI发现了一种此前未被建模的不对称力：领头粒子将后方粒子向自己拉近，而尾随粒子则将领头粒子向前推。模型准确率达99%，超过大多数物理理论——以及所有科学记者。
verification_notes: Published April 22, 2026 per ScienceDaily URL (260422). Cross-referenced with Interesting Engineering and Phys.org. Emory University researchers. 99% accuracy and asymmetric force findings confirmed.

blurb_en: The Academy announced that AI-generated actors and AI-written screenplays are ineligible for Oscar nominations, effective immediately. The rule arrives as studios quietly replace background performers and punch up dialogue with generative tools. Hollywood’s position is now official: if a machine did the work, no statue. Whether the audience can tell the difference is a question the Academy would prefer you not ask.
blurb_zh: 美国电影艺术与科学学院宣布，AI 生成的演员和 AI 编写的剧本即日起不得参与奥斯卡提名。此规出台之际，各大片厂正悄悄用生成式工具替换群演、润色对白。好莱坞的立场现已明确：机器干的活，不配拿小金人。至于观众能不能分辨——学院宁愿你别问。
verification_notes: Reported in BBC Tech Decoded newsletter (May 5, 2026). Oscar eligibility rules confirmed.

blurb_en: Astria published a workflow combining GPT-Image-2 for storyboard frames and Seedance 2.0 for motion — one prompt in, a 15-second fashion video out, garment consistent across every frame. No compositing, no manual keyframes, no wardrobe department. The pipeline costs less than a coffee. The fashion industry spent decades building a $3 trillion supply chain to make clothes look good on camera. Turns out you just needed a text box.
blurb_zh: Astria 发布了一套工作流：用 GPT-Image-2 生成分镜画面，再用 Seedance 2.0 赋予动态——输入一条提示词，输出一段15秒时装视频，服装在每一帧保持一致。不需要合成，不需要手动关键帧，不需要服装部门。整条流水线的成本不到一杯咖啡。时装业花了几十年建起三万亿美元的供应链让衣服上镜好看。原来你只需要一个文本框。
verification_notes: From Astria newsletter (May 5, 2026). GPT-Image-2 and Seedance 2.0 integration confirmed. Workflow produces consistent garment across frames.

blurb_en: OpenAI had to manually instruct ChatGPT to stop mentioning goblins. The company noticed the word — along with “gremlins” — had started appearing unprompted in metaphors across unrelated conversations. No one knows why. OpenAI patched it out, which is the AI equivalent of telling your coworker to please stop bringing up his homebrew D&D campaign in client meetings.
blurb_zh: OpenAI 不得不手动要求 ChatGPT 停止提及哥布林。公司发现这个词和「小精灵」开始在毫不相关的对话中自发出现在各种比喻里。没人知道为什么。OpenAI 打了补丁修复，这相当于 AI 版的「请你别在客户会议上聊你的自制龙与地下城战役了」。
verification_notes: Reported in BBC Tech Decoded newsletter (May 5, 2026). OpenAI confirmed the issue and patched it.
